overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through an industrial harbor district. The scene features brick warehouses, railroad tracks, smoking factory chimneys, and a wooden waterfront pier with moored boats in a hazy, overcast atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy industrial approach alongside railroad tracks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through grassy terrain alongside railroad tracks, approaching industrial buildings

entered.detail: weathered red brick building with wooden door on the right side of the path
parallel steel railroad tracks running through the industrial district
tall factory chimneys emitting dark smoke visible in the hazy distance
elevated wooden water tower structure behind the warehouse building
wooden telegraph poles with crossbars lining the railroad tracks

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a grassy industrial area on the outskirts of a town. The camera moves forward along a dirt path beside a red brick warehouse, with railroad tracks running parallel to the left. In the distance, factory smokestacks pierce the hazy overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: railroad corridor with industrial buildings and carriage road

events.description: horse-drawn carriage enters frame and moves parallel to the railroad tracks

agents.ego_description: walking along the railroad tracks passing the Saint Denis building

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving along the dirt road parallel to the tracks

entered.detail: two-story wooden building with SAINT DENIS signage visible on the facade
black wooden carriage with two horses traveling along the road
stacked wooden pallets and cargo materials beside the tracks

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the railroad tracks past the Saint Denis building. A horse-drawn carriage travels parallel to the tracks on the adjacent road. The industrial smokestacks grow larger and more prominent as the camera approaches the factory district.

events.description: transitions from dirt path onto wooden waterfront dock structure
rider on horseback crosses the railroad tracks from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking onto the wooden pier and approaching the harbor waterfront

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback crossing the railroad tracks ahead

entered.detail: elevated wooden dock structure with weathered planks extending over the water
murky green harbor water with reflections of the industrial buildings
small wooden sailboats and skiffs moored along the dock
large warehouse building on wooden stilts extending over the water

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the dirt path onto a wooden waterfront pier. The harbor comes into view with moored boats floating on murky water. A rider on horseback crosses the tracks ahead, and the camera moves deeper onto the dock structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial harbor waterfront with moored boats

events.description: camera turns left to follow the dock curve back toward the industrial area

agents.ego_description: walking along the harbor dock observing boats and waterfront, then turning back toward the industrial district

notable_agents.action: group of dock workers standing by the railing looking out at the water
man in work clothes walking along the dock toward the camera

entered.detail: weathered wooden safety railing along the edge of the pier
overhead wooden lamp posts with glass enclosures along the dock

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the wooden harbor dock, passing dock workers and observing the moored sailboats in the murky water. The camera turns to reveal more of the industrial waterfront, with the smokestacks of Saint Denis visible in the hazy distance across the harbor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a grassy industrial outskirts into the heart of a hazy harbor district. It begins along a dirt path beside a red brick warehouse and parallel railroad tracks, with distant factory smokestacks piercing an overcast sky. As the camera advances past the Saint Denis buildings, a horse-drawn carriage travels along the adjacent road while the industrial chimneys grow larger and more prominent. The scene then shifts from the dirt path onto a wooden waterfront pier, passing a rider on horseback before moving deeper onto the dock structure. Finally, the camera glides past dock workers and moored sailboats on murky water, turning to reveal the expansive industrial waterfront and the distant, smoking skyline of the city.
